active_profile_source: active paper profile plus S04-S08 unit-specific controls; no global venue/profile default
producer_return_obligations: coverage_ledger mapping every required upstream control to selected/deferred/rejected
downstream_packet_requirements for S09B packet identity, paths, validators, return format, and lock policy

checks: all S04-S08 controls required by the target unit are selected, deferred with reason, or routed upstream
control_priority_map resolves conflicts before packet assembly
context layers are labeled as claim authority, background, adjacent context, or forbidden use
downstream_packet_requirements are sufficiently concrete for S09B without worker guessing
S09A does not emit final content or worker task packet
nearest responsible stage routing is explicit for missing controls

downstream_design_force: S09B must preserve selected controls and usage labels losslessly
S10/S11 receive concrete move, claim, object, surface, and visual obligations instead of a generic writing prompt
S12/S13/S16 and RenderedManuscriptAuditGate can trace each produced unit back to selected controls

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: target unit lacks mandatory hard constraints, claim controls, or downstream packet requirements
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: selected controls are incomplete, stale, or conflict without resolution
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local labeling or priority-map defect that can be repaired without changing upstream semantics
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: potential downstream usability risk tracked without forced full rerun

nearest_responsible_stage_policy: S09A owns control selection defects; missing upstream substance routes to the concrete source stage S04/S05/S06/S07/S08, never bare S09.
anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR and WATCH findings may update local labels, priority order, or risk ledger; only BLOCKING/MAJOR unresolved control failures force upstream backflow.
